name: loopd-orchestrator
description: Experimental orchestrator plugin channel — published from the experimental/orchestrator-v1 branch so it can be updated independently of the stable loopd plugin (which lives on main).

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Experimental autonomous GitHub issue resolution loop. Lead Claude thread + 7 teammates (issue-analyzer / tester / issue-scout / product-planner / roadmap-strategist / vision-critic / system-doctor) auto-invoke loopd /dev-task. Configurable response language, per-repo parallel instances, and self-healing stall recovery. Requires the stable loopd plugin to be installed separately, plus CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1.
